} } function assertEnvSet(loc, value) { if (loc.parent.type === "env") { throw new Error(`${(0, _optionAssertions.msg)(loc)} is not allowed inside of another .env block`); } const parent = loc.parent; const lastItem = items[index - 1]; const thisItem = items[index]; if (lastItem.file && lastItem.options === undefined && typeof thisItem.value === "object") { e.message += `\n- Maybe you meant to use\n` + `"${type}s": [\n ["${lastItem.file.request}", ${JSON.stringify(thisItem.value, undefined, 2)}]\n]\n` + `To be a valid ${type}, its name and options should be wrapped in a pair of brackets`;
